sections.name: Tortas and snacks
items: Beef Quesabirria - red chile braised beef, jack cheese, roasted red onions, cilantro, served with broth for dipping
Carne Asada - chile-rubbed prime sirloin, avocado, poblano rajas, arugula, chimichurri
Chipotle-Roasted Chicken - avocado, poblano rajas, Chihuahua cheese, arugula, cilantro crema
Chorizo + Queso - Gunthorp Farms chorizo, jack cheese, poblano rajas, avocado
Cubana Clasica - Berkshire pork loin, carnitas, bacon, jack cheese, chipotle mustard, pickled onions
Crispy Chicken Milanesa - Napa cabbage, pickled jalapenos, Cotija cheese, avocado-tomatillo salsa, cilantro crema
Eggplant Milanesa - vegetarian version of the crispy chicken milanesa torta
Chile + Garlic Peanuts
Chips + Salsa - tomatillo + chipotle
Chips + Guacamole - Almost Naked
Chips + Guacamole - Fully Dressed - bacon, serrano chiles, Cotija cheese, pepitas, tomatoes
Queso Fundido - jack, fontina + Cotija cheese, cilantro, roasted peppers + onions

sections.name: Soups, salads, tacos, and more
items: Tortilla Soup - avocado, Chihuahua cheese, pasilla chile, lime crema, tortilla strips, cilantro + onion
Guacamole Cobb - romaine + arugula, bacon, roasted corn + black bean salsa, tomatoes, poblano rajas, queso fresco, chipotle ranch dressing
El Tortazo - romaine + arugula, avocado, black beans, radishes, poblano rajas, cilantro, tortilla strips, green chile citrus vinaigrette
Crispy Chicken Peanut Crunch - kale + cabbage, pickled carrots, sesame-peanut crunch, spicy salsa macha vinaigrette
Baja Chicken tacos - avocado, queso fresco, chipotle mayo, slaw, cilantro
Carnitas tacos - guacamole, radish, cilantro + onion
Carne Asada tacos - pico de gallo
Chicken Al Pastor tacos - roasted pineapple + onion salsa, cilantro
Shrimp Dorados Style tacos - shrimp, Chihuahua cheese, salsa diabla, crema, slaw, cilantro + onion
Barbacoa tacos - red chile braised beef, roasted onions, Cotija cheese, cilantro + onion
Chicken + Bacon quesadilla - tomatoes, Chihuahua cheese, garlic mojo, cilantro crema
Roasted Mushroom quesadilla - poblano rajas, Chihuahua cheese, garlic mojo, cilantro crema
Carne Asada + Rajas quesadilla - chile-rubbed sirloin, Chihuahua cheese, poblano rajas, avocado-tomatillo salsa
Chicken Chilaquiles - poblano rajas, Cotija + Chihuahua cheese, black beans, tortilla strips, salsa roja
Fried Plantains - Cotija cheese, lime crema
Black Beans - queso fresco, cilantro + red onion
Fully Dressed Wheel Chips - puffed not pork chicharrones, Valentina, Tajin, Cotija cheese
Cinnamon Sugar Churros
Kids Crispy Chicken Strips + Chips
Grilled Cheese Torta
Cheese Quesadilla
Chicken Tacos

notes: Stored from a user paste so future rescans can use the pasted Tortazo menu text without refetching the website.
The pasted menu explicitly includes peanuts in Chile + Garlic Peanuts and in the Crispy Chicken Peanut Crunch.
User noted that the allergen guide only calls out tree nuts in the horchata.
